---
pagetitle: "Michał Adamczyk — Data Science"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  max-items: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

::: {.hero}
# Michał Adamczyk

::: {.lead}
Senior data scientist with 10 years building ML and analytics systems in
production. I write here about applied machine learning, the numbers behind
the tech industry, and the occasional deep dive into the theory I find
beautiful.
:::

[Read the writing →](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
&nbsp;
[About me →](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

## Latest writing

::: {#latest-posts}
:::
